news.t: Overlay Shares Announces Change to Investment Objective and Strategy for the Overlay Shares Hedged Large Cap Equity ETF (OVLH)

overview.description: The Overlay Shares Hedged Large Cap Equity ETF (OVLH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to provide exposure to the US large-cap space combined with an option overlay strategy, utilizing a put spread and long-term OTM put options. OVLH was launched on Jan 14, 2021 and is issued by Liquid Strategies.

data.title: Overlay Shares Announces Change to Investment Objective and Strategy for the Overlay Shares Hedged Large Cap Equity ETF (OVLH)
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--OVLH will change its investment objective and revise its principal investment strategies effective December 31, 2025.
